rows.title: Shopify launches AI storefront generator
rows.summary: Shopify announced Magic Storefronts at Unite 2026 — an LLM-driven storefront generator that creates a complete shop in under 60 seconds. Targets SMBs who currently can't afford a design team.
rows.why_it_matters: Lowers the barrier for SMBs to launch stores; pushes competition down-market. ACME Corp is enterprise-tier so direct overlap is limited, but it commoditizes the 'storefront-as-a-service' tier that ACME partners with.

rows.title: BigCommerce acquires Bagel for headless commerce search
rows.summary: BigCommerce acquired Bagel, a headless commerce search startup, to bundle search + recommendations into their enterprise tier. Bagel's embedding-based search outperforms ACME's current Elasticsearch-based implementation.
rows.why_it_matters: Direct competitive threat on enterprise search. ACME's plans to evaluate embedding-based rerank (idea eeee...ee11) become urgent — otherwise we cede the personalization differentiation to BigCommerce.

rows.title: B2B buyers expect B2C-grade checkout experiences
rows.summary: Gartner Q2 2026 report: 67% of B2B buyers now expect one-click checkout, wallet support, and real-time shipping estimates — features historically only in B2C. The line between B2B and B2C commerce is dissolving.
rows.why_it_matters: ACME's B2C investments in wallet support (idea eeee...ee21), shipping estimates, and one-click checkout are pre-requisites for the B2B expansion roadmap. Accelerate the wallet work to keep pace.

rows.title: Edge-deployed personalization goes mainstream
rows.summary: Cloudflare and Fastly both announced turnkey edge personalization platforms in Q2 2026. Sub-50ms personalization at the edge is becoming table stakes for high-traffic retailers.
rows.why_it_matters: ACME's edge ML plan (idea eeee...ee19) is the right call but the competitive window is narrowing. Cloudflare's turnkey solution means we need to differentiate on quality, not just latency.

rows.title: PCI-DSS v4.0 enforcement begins August 2026
rows.summary: Payment Card Industry Security Standards Council confirmed v4.0 enforcement deadline. New requirements: continuous compliance, MFA on all admin access, and encrypted cardholder data at rest with HSM-backed keys.
rows.why_it_matters: ACME's PCI scope reduction (idea eeee...ee02) is well-timed. Need to ensure the new MFA + HSM requirements are baked into the rollout scope; otherwise we'll need a follow-up project post-enforcement.

rows.title: Multi-vendor payment routing emerges as a SRE best practice
rows.summary: CNCF Q2 2026 survey: 41% of large retailers now run multi-vendor payment processors. Post-mortems from 2025 outage season cite single-vendor dependency as the #1 avoidable risk.
rows.why_it_matters: Validates ACME's multi-vendor payment (idea eeee...ee08) approach. SRE leadership is aligned; speed up procurement for Adyen.

rows.title: OpenFeature v1.0 stable released
rows.summary: OpenFeature reached v1.0 in July 2026. The CNCF-graduated spec now has stable SDKs across 12 languages and a managed-provider reference implementation.
rows.why_it_matters: ACME's feature flag standardization (idea eeee...ee25) just became easier — v1.0 means we can commit without an 'experimental' caveat. Approve the project.

rows.title: DragonflyDB 1.0 released — drop-in Redis replacement
rows.summary: DragonflyDB reached 1.0 in July 2026 with full Redis 7.2 protocol compatibility. Production benchmarks show 5x throughput per node on cache workloads.
rows.why_it_matters: ACME's Redis-to-Dragonfly migration (idea eeee...ee27) is now low-risk. Projected $24k/year savings hold up. Schedule for Q4 maintenance window.

rows.title: Istio Ambient Mesh declared production-ready
rows.summary: Istio project announced ambient mesh (ztunnel + waypoint) is production-ready as of 1.22 release. Cuts per-pod memory from 200MB to <10MB.
rows.why_it_matters: ACME's mesh migration (idea eeee...ee16) de-risked significantly. Recommend accelerating to Q3 to align with cost-reduction targets.
